title: desmos subbiglandulosus
intro: Desmos subbiglandulosus, also known as Desmodium subhumbertii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antipyretic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The herbal preparations of Desmos subbiglandulosus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
